text:
In the heart of the dense woods, nestled amidst ancient oaks and whispering willows, lived Lucy. She was known for her shy grin and love for the sun. On one peculiar morning, a vibrant butterfly named Benny fluttered into her world. Benny was unlike any Lucy had ever seen—he was iridescent, with delicate orange feathers that caught the morning light. Unconventional as he was, Benny sparked an adventure within Lucy.

The two became inseparable. Benny would hang by her feet, watching as she painted the world with stripes of yellows, oranges, and purples. He would chase the sunlight across her back as she danced. Together, they explored secret glades and danced under the rainbows.

One day, Lucy's quiet nature began to change. An unusual urge crept within her. She suggested an exploration of the forest floor. Benny was thrilled! They discovered hidden flowers that sang gently and scents that danced on the breeze. Lucy found a smooth stone
